data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. JAGUAR JETT doesn't show much early dash but winds into his races, two back missing the frame but last time hitting the line hard to place when second (20.22) in a Grade 5 at this track last time. Has a good record at this journey. Comes through a solid form race last start. Makes plenty of appeal. 5. CHEEKY CHARM recorded a 4 length win (20.02) in a Grade 6 last time at this track. Can hit the frame with the right run. 7. ZIPPING MEHARY goes very well over this track and trip including two wins. Recorded a 0.8 lengths win (30.05) in a Restricted WIN last time at Q Parklands. Looks a key chance on best figures. 1. RAGING RHINO was out of the money at this circuit last start but can atone.","runners":[8,5,7,1],"exclusive":false}
